overall.description: First-person underwater exploration gameplay from Subnautica, featuring swimming through a dense alien kelp forest with distinctive tall stalks. The player encounters a Stalker creature near the surface and explores submerged wreckage and industrial structures in a green-tinted ocean environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense kelp forest with scattered wreckage

agents.ego_description: swimming slowly through dense kelp forest, navigating between tall stalks and examining rocky outcrops

entered.detail: tall alien kelp stalks reaching upward, densely packed with spiral leaf patterns
moss-covered rocky formation with small cave-like indentations
scattered pieces of rusted metal wreckage partially buried in sand

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a dense underwater kelp forest with tall spiral kelp stalks surrounding the view. Rocky outcrops and scattered metal wreckage dot the sandy seafloor in this semi-enclosed underwater environment with filtered green light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water near surface with bright light penetration

events.description: ascending toward water surface, light brightens from diffused green to bright overhead sunlight
large alien Stalker creature with spotted bioluminescent tail enters the frame from below

agents.ego_description: swimming upward toward the bright surface while observing the approaching creature

notable_agents.action: Stalker creature swimming in circles near surface, displaying bioluminescent spots on its tail

entered.detail: rippling water surface with bright sunlight filtering through from above

segments.scene_description: The player ascends toward the bright water surface where sunlight penetrates directly, transitioning from the dense kelp forest to open water. A Stalker creature with a distinctive spotted tail swims into view and circles near the surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water column following the creature

events.description: beginning descent back down toward the seafloor after following the creature

agents.ego_description: following and watching the Stalker creature as it swims through open water, maintaining visual contact

notable_agents.action: Stalker swimming gracefully in circles, occasionally turning to face the player

segments.scene_description: The player follows the Stalker creature through open water near the surface, then begins descending back toward the seafloor. Rocky formations become visible again as the player moves closer to the bottom.

events.description: large industrial platform structure emerges from the kelp forest ahead

agents.ego_description: descending toward and approaching the large platform structure, examining its metal surfaces and attached pipes

entered.detail: massive rectangular submerged platform with flat top and vertical supports
tall cylindrical metal tower with horizontal pipes extending from the platform

segments.scene_description: The player descends toward a large submerged industrial platform that emerges from the surrounding kelp. The structure features a flat top with a tall cylindrical tower and attached pipes, while kelp stalks frame the view on all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that begins in a dense kelp forest, ascends to the sunlit surface, and finally descends toward a submerged industrial structure. It begins by gliding through tall spiral kelp stalks and past scattered metal wreckage on a sandy seafloor bathed in filtered green light. As the camera ascends, the enclosed forest gives way to open water where bright sunlight penetrates the surface and a spotted Stalker creature swims into view. The scene then shifts as the camera follows the creature before diving back down, with rocky formations gradually reappearing through the depths. Finally, the descent leads the camera toward a large industrial platform featuring a cylindrical tower and pipes, which emerges from the surrounding kelp.
